hc5d8224cgd4ffg432agab23ge4eb014916a2: By the gods, you're a sweet sight.
h481697e7gc365g434dga669gde873fffd973: Are any of my crew still alive out there?
h3a1390c4g9de2g480bgb521gb14cf804b4fc: This whole journey's been one grim sight after another. Gnolls, goblins... drow.
hb7375560gd957g4debg85f4g387113ee922b: Risen Road's more dangerous than ever. You're the first friendly face we've seen since Elturgard.
hc2a3acc3g7d5ag49c8g896cg509d3eb3e6e5: Elturgard's a long way from here. Where are you heading?
h22f3cd3ag97a3g4187ga583g042d2ee4db3e: We're bound for Baldur's Gate - got some cargo to deliver. But we've a stop to make along the way.
h4f372729ga70cg4effg8e00gdbf9bbe10494: Waukeen's Rest. It's just up the road. I'd be enjoying a mug of ale right now if those beasts hadn't jumped us.
h092982a6g7688g44e8gae94geaf4418ac230: Listen. You look like you know how to handle yourself.
ha179162bgdf91g4ea0g8f04g25c75ddd03a3: You should meet my associates. We've got our own drinking spot by the tavern - invitation only.
h6156f0e5g7d8eg44e7gab6dg6ec495effd73: Tell the fellow on the door 'little serpent, long shadow'. He'll take good care of you.
h7ffeb57fg33b1g43a5g9faegd2711d15738b: It's fine. We'd be dead if they hadn't showed up. A little hospitality won't do any harm.
h0c00f2b4g01ffg42e7g9504g37a7661478d8: Waukeen's Rest has been burned to the ground.
hdd1e9a16gb714g4989ga17age173da61ccfb: Damn it. Nowhere's safe any more.
hed7541cfg69b7g4d28gb5a2ge31e042042ee: Doesn't change the plan though - we'll head over there, and check for survivors.
hb89e668dga3f4g45b6gaa6dgbcb1fe45e911: What's in the chest? Your cargo?
h76cb8722g2298g4f75ga6f2g05ba2a3280cf: Aye. The whole reason we're in this mess. Trinkets for some rich tosser in Baldur's Gate.
he8436a41ge029g4e7fgbc3cgae6a876c5f3e: He gets his shiny baubles, we get a handful of Tarenths.
h7eebced7g74bag43fcg8d4agc824c18c14d7: *Tarenths are the currency of the Zhentarim - a network of merchants and mercenaries with few scruples.*
hfc300b37g2dafg4341g9b33g2511101f2333: You're Zhentarim. Your people don't deal in 'baubles'.
h398e1641g8321g4be4g9fefg59bfe9055f4e: A lot of people died for those baubles.
hd84f06adg5968g47bdgbad7g55c4deeead47: Rich men place more value on wine and fine clothes than on the lives of folks like me.
h99737a15gbf61g4dadgb14fg1a90d7ec946b: It's a pretty bit of frippery that'll sit on a mantel gathering dust. But the pay for delivering it makes the risk worthwhile.
hde275e86g21ceg4e6fg80f4gb1dd2e314a11: Whatever your cargo is, I'll take it as payment.
hbd941e9aga1f6g440ega8e3gd086bebfccbc: Listen - I'm indebted to you. And that's why I'm giving you a chance to walk away before you get yourself killed.
hbc52f052gfa42g43cbg9c19gd2b315861d5d: You made short work of the gnolls... reckon you'd make shorter work of me and the boy.
hae9614dcg695dg45e6ga341gdf3d7d81c25d: But we're not merchants; we're Zhentarim agents. Steal from us, and you'll have a price on your head.
hdfb7545cgb0aeg4657ga27dgadc69f99f983: Zhentarim agents guarding a single chest. Curious.
h80c09a7ag694dg4512g9d5eg61c93fd86529: If there are valuable goods on the move, The Black Company's always involved.
h752d2cf2g5769g40fbga928g97b7bffd0934: We're the grease that keeps the wheels of commerce turning.
h1bc26600gce0fg4345ga93cg5bfec01d470b: And we don't take kindly to people who meddle in our business.
hb6c62dd8g4444g4d9fgb671g33df7fbdca28: If your bosses come after the chest, I'll kill them as well.
h8ca1e120g3469g4467gb303g5f04df1d6c45: Tougher bastards than you have tried. Let's just go our separate ways, and be thankful we're all in one piece.
h969bc809g8b9dg4563g83dbg7f3a249a94d4: If I lose that cargo, my people will do worse to me than the gnolls would've.
h142221edg61cbg4bc4gb8acgbb642767aa12: The Zhentarim aren't known for mercy, true.
hf1162f44ga454g4646ga992gf1efa8a7837b: You know who we are - very clever. Then you probably also know it's not smart to interfere with Zhent business.
hc499c5dbg9126g49afga9dbgb44c3e824a33: This is the point when a clever lass like you accepts my gratitude and walks away.
h12a9a8d9gf591g45e8gb4afg5687e2c894fc: This is the point when a clever lad like you accepts my gratitude and walks away.
h9faf7b2egf9b7g46dag88c6g9507d4d5ef9f: No. This is the point where I stop asking, and start cutting.
h86fe7d4bg7293g4a3ag815bge9fc58a30409: Fine - no need for more violence. I'll tell my associates everything was lost in the ambush.
h427140dbgd445g41bag96ebga6fb7b6837df: The chest's all yours. Damn thing's sealed tighter than a Duke's pursestrings, so there's no point in trying to open it.
h65ac40c8g6806g4111g8d9fg57a6f706bad2: And no hard feelings, y'hear? I'd have done the same if I were you. Business at the end of a blade is still business.
hb9c9ccfdgc844g4fabg9fc7g7fb003a40b56: Ruthless bastard like you could make a name for yourself in the Zhentarim. Make sure to drop by our hideout.
h0ab8c584gf499g4209ga16fg7c3456dc89a5: If I give up that cargo, my associates will do worse to me than you ever could, lad.
h6846a85egba5eg4192ga855g1821f692f22f: My associates will do worse to me than you ever could, lass.
hda4dea21g0353g46d6gb6c7g480666550390: This is your employer's mess - but we can profit. Let's sell the cargo ourselves.
h6eefcb14g6391g48e8ga78bg8d2263619e0e: I like the way you think. Didn't expect to turn this horrorshow to my advantage... but why not?
hbda96c3eg0481g42eega713g1073dc9c3225: I know a fence in Baldur's Gate who'll take it off your hands. Nobody will be the wiser.
hed7866f1gf25fg4c62g8ed8g62670e1f17f3: Don't try to cut me out of the deal though. The Black Network has eyes and blades everywhere.
hbbf40112g3b4dg4c55g8b5fg906e8565fcc8: Crafty swine like you could make a name for yourself in the Zhentarim. Make sure to drop by our hideout.
hed7b14bdgf339g4666gb115g44eca2ace50e: Crafty swine like you could make a name for yourself in the Zhentarim. Make sure to drop by our hideout.
he3dcecedg1b3eg4945gba1cg09725f8007d5: Pass phrase at the door is 'little serpent, long shadow'. I'll tell my associates to expect you.
h528abda6g1d1eg40a6g8800gcec9b4015ad1: I already met your friends - we didn't get along too well.
hd1c3e022gb7fcg49c6gb84eg1e8b103961c4: And yet here you are. There's not many cause trouble in a Zhent hideout and walk away.
hdceab406g5656g4f3dgbb82g686e06b92d4b: I'd rather walk away too. So let's say our goodbyes, and speak no more of it.
hd40cf968g5610g43e3gbeb2gdaf62b200932: Fair. But I expect to be paid for saving your life.
hc08b9d0ag9cb9g46b5gbab8gde941b302f76: Of course. I was just about to suggest the same thing.
hd6fdecb6ga679g4db2gab4agfa56db8a8b31: I'd have given you my coin already if I had any. I've nothing for you, friend.
h7cffa25dgfe46g499bg9d8egecdf727a567a: I don't think so - you sound rattled. Those gnolls put up quite a fight, I bet.
h44ecf742g3a12g421cga86eg3db762560e92: You can leave - but your cargo stays.
h802c9145gfb1fg4db0gaecag5ef1468ac478: Take it. Just let me go - you don't need any more blood on your hands.
h272cbb1cga067g4a44g9789gf803c2959d1b: You talk big - but I don't believe you took on the whole hideout. This belongs to the Zhent!
hb753a174gb330g4627g9ce3g926b5b0cd726: Coin ain't any use to the dead. And dead's what I'll be if I welch on this deal.
h6e62f8cbg4278g42bcgb6dbg8612c5d4f1eb: Let's go our separate ways, and be thankful we're all in one piece.
h6362020egd2a2g48b9g8d8dg8ef80874c3f0: You had your chance. Either way, that cargo's mine.
h384c73bbg7eaeg41efga287g4f9d57a2e83a: Bloody fool. May the Black Hand take you.
hcfdba7eeg90cdg456fg8523g7ed95ee760c3: You're missing a golden opportunity. Report the cargo lost - and we can sell it ourselves.
h9879f9f6g74d3g4ee0ga992g00ca16f52891: It's not hospitality I want - it's coin.
h94fddaf9g7d37g4ab4g8fb4gc5b71b7c3055: Shame we lost so many agents. But the chest is all that matters - Zarys'd have our hides if we lost it.
hcf437f52g8ca4g4585g9ed9g9e040e71df1b: Zarys sent me to secure the cargo.
hbf946408g44c4g4c94gb4bfg74de3e9a3a40: Zarys sent me to secure the cargo.
hfc3be7c3g26f2g42c4gaad4g97ee00710567: Maybe I should come - see you don't get waylaid again.
hec6a4531g3f09g459fg8ac0gad141ed94c02: Thanks. But that won't be necessary. We'll find help at Waukeen's Rest.
h311ac667g282fg4243gabb6g4234e143746d: Trinkets for some rich tosser in Baldur's Gate.
h360e4bfeg89aag40a7g9b8fgad7a7d621b5f: I'll stay friendly - so long as your hand over all your goods.
ha82cdc30g0d8dg49edgbb57g87b63c5837cf: Hold on now. You made short work of the beasts, and I reckon you'd make shorter of me and the boy.
h614112f9g49b8g4f00gb01fgbc7c0aa128c4: But we're not plump little merchants you can boss around.
h88682546g94c0g4035g935fg99f67ca4daa1: All I saw was blood and guts.
hae92bc0agea20g4459g945cg71f43e9ee702: Damn it. I guess that's a no.
hc3d948acge385g4b72ga2acg3738b85bc58b: All dead. Zarys sent me to secure the cargo.
hae50779fgecf2g4f9cg8706g74dc4ae1c58d: We'll take the chest back to the hideout. I owe you a drink. Lots of drinks.
h27a8e3cag62aag48c1g8ec3g3832bc9ac759: Since when does a mule know what it carries?
h11246e76g1fe5g4744g8fafge0cdaa84d90b: This isn't a rescue, it's a robbery. I want the chest.
hbfc6c1c0g8cf1g405fg9704g2dbad5c63d7c: You bloody idiot. If Zarys doesn't get that chest, she'll have us all killed.
h71441af7g6af4g4e7eg8b98g0c94491d0d05: You saved my life. I'm grateful for that - Zarys will be too - but I need to deliver the cargo. This is the point when you walk away.
heb643d80g4a50g437ag9a77g41befb9b31ed: Bloody fool. You don't scare me!
h54d12ad8g1ac0g4bf1gbd82g8921c664a72a: You owe me more than a drink. How about some coin?
h4f265387gd24fg4345g92d5g52d3297d4c0c: Black Hand be thanked. I didn't think anyone would find us.
h21a6af98gda81g4fffga421gaa7f311126a1: Thank the gods that's over. Wish you'd been with us when the beasts attacked on the road.
h69581d0agf922g40f6ga5bcg3b42b9387d46: I'll take the cargo back to Zarys at the hideout. Drop by and see me when you can - I owe you a drink.
h3dc77776gef0eg460fgae55gff82565b1464: Might have been more survivors... I don't suppose you saw any of my crew alive out there?
hb26bed72g2ea0g4270gb7f6g588a98c58e60: Remember - getting that chest to Baldur's Gate is your job. Then we share the profits.
h758aae7agfd31g4621g8ba7gcdc6fa788181: The chest's yours. I've got nothing else for you, and I don't want trouble.
h0f41f32eg8ce7g4ce5gae5egbbbe88027128: Thanks again. We'll head out as soon as we've caught our breath.
hd51b9251ga361g4464g992dgbebb4dfbad33: Thanks. You always seem to show up at just the right time.
h3945b62bg9021g48f1g808dgd23d6a291a2c: Thanks again. Hope Zarys treated you to something nice.
hd555d9f6g8ad7g46a5gb449g422e5824997e: That drink I promised will have to wait. We're moving out. The Elfsong's my local - look me up if you're in the city.
h6bfd476fg99c9g4619g9a68g13058eefb90b: Risen Road's more dangerous than ever. Packs of gnolls running wild. Be careful out there.
